codeReview.summary: The feature implementation satisfies the stated requirements: Vitest and required dev dependencies were added in web/, a Vitest config with happy-dom was created, package.json includes `test: vitest run`, and multiple real tests were added under web/src/lib with broad api.ts coverage and passing verification recorded in the handoff.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The integration-worker skill does not document a known Node.js 25 + happy-dom localStorage incompatibility encountered during this feature, even though it is a practical Vitest setup gotcha.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Worker handoff suggests this update explicitly at /Users/sdawka/.factory/missions/d8fa6f8d-4b8d-4089-827f-d5cd03a2e873/handoffs/2026-04-06T03-37-59-350Z__vitest-setup__d3ab62f1-4a02-4dfd-b4ff-2811a4357329.json:229; workaround is present in web/src/lib/connection.test.ts:14-16.

summary: Pass. I reviewed the transcript skeleton and commit diff for vitest-setup and found the feature complete against its acceptance criteria, with no blocking or non-blocking code defects identified.
